allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "User scope:    $\([System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('DATABASE_URL','User'\)\)"; Write-Output "Machine scope: $\([System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('DATABASE_URL','Machine'\)\)"; Write-Output "Process scope: $\([System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('DATABASE_URL','Process'\)\)")
PowerShell(Write-Output "DATABASE_URL in this shell: $env:DATABASE_URL"; Write-Output "--- migrate ---"; pnpm db:migrate 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)
